---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new idea or feature requirement.
title: 'feat: '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Proposal
Describe the feature request clearly and concisely.

## User Problem Statement
What user needs or pain points does this proposal solve? (e.g. "As a salesperson, I need to...")

## Proposed Implementation / UI Flow
Explain how the feature should behave, how users navigate to it, or show mockups/sketches.

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've thought about.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, API design ideas, or reference links here.
